service_requests.note_text: Situation: left shoulder work injury. Background: MRI confirms full-thickness rotator cuff tear. Assessment: complete left rotator cuff tear. Recommendation:

Situation: painful left femur lesion with suspected pathological fracture. Background: imaging suggests left femur fracture and oncology referral is pending. Assessment: coded draft lists right femur. Recommendation: urgent orthopedic evaluation and oncology coordination.
